creator: sat@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I'm sorry, but what do you want me to do about it? The problem 
is well-known, it's not firefox- or thunderbird-specific, many 
linux apps hang on generic gtk dialogs like file open/save. 

I haven't been able to reproduce this bug on current for quite 
some time now. So if you'd like to be on the edge of linux 
binary compatibility development, you're welcome to run 7.x.
